items.markdown:
Himalayan salt lamps come in a variety of styles, from the classic **natural rock shape** to intricate hand-carved designs like **flowers, pyramids, and spheres** . Most authentic lamps are mined from the Himalayan mountains and include features like **dimmer switches** for adjustable brightness or **USB power** for use at a desk or bedside. Larger statement pieces can weigh up to 40 lbs, while mini versions are perfect for small spaces or as color-changing nightlights.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Salt-Natural-Carvbed-Medium/dp/B075LL3DVV)[[2]](https://www.homedepot.com/p/Himalayan-Glow-Himalayan-Salt-Lamp-10-in-Tall-Night-Light-Table-Lamp-with-Dimmer-Switch-4-lbs-to-6-lbs-HD-1001A/322327152#:~:text=Himalayan%20Glow9%20in.%E2%80%8B,99)[[3]](https://antiquatedjoys.com/products/himalayan-salt-nightlight)[[4]](https://www.homedepot.com/p/Himalayan-Glow-7-8-in-Unique-Pyramid-Salt-Lamp-1359/306459731)[[5]](https://www.at-automaterial.at/Shape-Himalayan-Salt-Lamp-7-8-Lb-Pink-Salt-Rock-With-Dimmer-693341#:~:text=Okay%2C%20this%20Nevlers%20salt%20lamp%20is%20seriously,unique%20-%20no%20two%20are%20exactly%20alike.)

Are you looking for a specific **weight** for a large room, or perhaps a **carved shape** for a gift?
